title: How to subscribe to WagerProof Pro
description: Step-by-step instructions for subscribing to WagerProof Pro on iOS, Android, or the web.

steps.title: Open the WagerProof app
steps.description: Launch the app and sign in to your account.

steps.title: Navigate to a Pro feature
steps.description: Try to access any Pro feature (e.g. full predictions, AI Agents) -- you'll see a paywall screen.

steps.title: Choose your plan
steps.description: Select monthly or annual billing. The annual plan offers a significant discount.

steps.title: Confirm with Apple
steps.description: Complete the purchase through Apple's in-app purchase system using Face ID, Touch ID, or your Apple ID password.

content.text: The process is similar on Android. Navigate to a Pro feature, choose your plan, and confirm the purchase through Google Play.
Web subscriptions are processed through Stripe. Navigate to Account settings and click 'Upgrade to Pro' to enter your payment details.
Your Pro subscription syncs across all platforms. Subscribe once and access Pro features on web, iOS, and Android.
